disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heart pounds and races within seconds of sitting up or standing
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you sit up or stand?
Tell me about the racing feeling.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: As soon as I sit up or stand my heart just pounds and races out of my chest — really fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms completely settle within about a minute of lying flat
trigger_question_examples: Does lying down flat make it better?
What happens to the racing and dizziness when you lie down?
How long does it take to settle once you lie flat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — if I lie back down flat the racing settles and the dizziness lifts within a minute or so. It's only when I'm upright.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It just kind of happens, I'm not sure what changes it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Vision tunnels and goes black on standing, with dizziness and legs giving way
trigger_question_examples: What happens to your vision when you stand?
Do you feel dizzy or faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My vision goes all tunnel and blacks out, I get really dizzy, and my legs feel like they'll give way.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-collapse event while walking, but no actual loss of consciousness and no fall/injury
trigger_question_examples: Did you actually black out or fall?
Have you fully passed out at any point?
Did you hit your head or hurt yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I nearly went down walking to the bathroom but I didn't actually black out — my parent caught me and I got back to bed. I haven't hit my head or hurt myself.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I felt like I was going to faint but I'm not sure exactly what happened.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, and no racing/palpitations when lying still
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any chest pain?
Does your heart race or thump when you're lying still and resting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain at all. When I'm lying still my heart feels normal — it's only when I sit up or stand that it races.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Longstanding poor recovery and postural dizziness since a viral illness, with profound fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Has this been building up over time?
Were you unwell before this started?
How have you been since that illness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started after a virus I never really got over — I've been dizzy on standing and exhausted ever since, and the last few days it's flared up badly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still able to sip fluids and passing urine; no persistent vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep fluids down?
Are you still passing urine normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can sip the drinks my parent brings and I'm still weeing, and I'm not vomiting.
